open_hooks_to_carry: Hester's death is specific, unsentimental, and tied to the season's bodily cost.
The burial beside Otto closes Hester's arc inside the town she refused to flatter.
prev_tail_excerpt:
...with the seed packet inside it. Dell was already easing himself down onto the pallet he had made by the flour sacks, jaw tight against the pull in his ribs. Hester stood in her doorway in her chemise, one hand braced to the frame, and watched Cora spread the flour sack over the narrow cot as if supervision were the final thing keeping the building upright.

"Enough," she said when Thea reached for one more loose spoon on the drainboard. "Go upstairs. If I die because you insisted on tidying, I'll come back and haunt you incompetently."

"You'd do it competently," Dell said into his blanket.

"Of course I would."

That was the last laugh of the night.

Later, in the room above the shop, Thea lay awake listening to the bakery settle around the cold. No steps went out toward the street. Below her, Dell turned once on the pallet and muttered at the pain of it. The cot behind the counter complained softly under Cora's weight and then went still. From Hester's room came one cough, then another, then a stretch of silence long enough to make Thea hold her own breath before the floorboards gave a small answering creak. Under the worktable the packed things waited in the dark: the valises, the quilt-wrapped jar crate, Dell's tool roll, her books cinched with clothesline.

Lincoln first, Thea thought, listening to the breathing below her and the packed crate waiting under the worktable.

The promise offered neither forever nor safety. It gave them only the first true distance any of them had managed to name, and tonight they were all sleeping under the same roof on the strength of it.
state_deltas_required: Bury Hester, mark Saint's Basin one last time, and leave Morrow without surrendering memory to myth or sentimentality.
The living leave with an honest inheritance instead of a saved town: memory is carried forward, but Morrow itself is relinquished.
